meaning: n.巴塞罗纳(西班牙东北部港市)
examples: There are 94 countries represented in Barcelona, from Algeria to Zimbabwe.
Barcelona has become one of the most dynamic and prosperous cities in the Mediterranean.
He is to join NBC to cover the Olympic Games in Barcelona next month as a roving reporter.
Built into a mountainside, the ultra-modern, Barcelona style is designed to blend into the landscape.
In the league, Real was left in Barcelona's dust and finished second by 15 points.
